libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Generate tests around normal WebClient usage with a local Vert.x HttpServer on loopback; avoid external network services. Ensure the nativeTest task passes runtime arguments -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true for libraryVersion 5.0.1 as well as 5.0.0.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient coverage would require the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency, but it is not necessary for meaningful core WebClient coverage.
If the generated tests exercise Netty multipart or streaming paths without the Java 25 unsafe-access runtime properties, native-image execution may fail despite valid reachability metadata.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for core Vert.x Web Client coverage, but Vert.x 5.0.1 resolves Netty 4.2.2.Final and native-image runs on Java 25 need the same Netty unsafe-access runtime properties already used for 5.0.0.
